title.ko: 일반 연소기관에의 가연혼합물 또는 그의 성분의 공급
title.en: SUPPLYING COMBUSTION ENGINES IN GENERAL WITH COMBUSTIBLE MIXTURES OR CONSTITUENTS THEREOF

definition.ko: 액체연료의 공급 기화기 시동, 아이들링, 플로트에 의해서 제어되는 유면; 혼합기제어; 교축, 혼합실 F02M1/00, F02M3/00; 5/00; 7/00, F02M9/00 가열, 냉각, 절연 F02M15/00 다단, 레지스터형; 기화기 또는 연료의 조합; 저압연료와의 조합 F02M11/00, F02M13/00, F02M71/00 기타 특성; 기타 세부 또는 부속품 F02M17/00, F02M19/00 분사장치 일반적 특성, 가스를 동반하지 않은 분사 2종이상의 연속적으로 공급하는 인젝 터를 가진 것; F02M41/00; 43/00 주기적으로 송출특성이 있는 것; 유체 조작 밸브를 가지는 것 F02M45/00; 47/00 실린더압력 또는 그의 피스톤에 의해 조작되는 펌프 또는 인젝터를 가지는 것 F02M49/00 전기적으로 조작되는 것 F02M51/00 가열, 냉각 또는 절연수단을 가지는 것; 연료관 또는 통기수단에 특징이 있는 것 F02M53/00; 55/00 다른 장치와 조합된 인젝터 F02M57/00 기관에 관한 장치의 배열, 펌프구동부에 관한 장치의 배열 F02M39/00 펌프의 그외의 적용; 그 외인 인젝터 F02M59/00; F02M61/00 기타 장치, 세부 또는 부속품 F02M63/00; F02M69/00 시험 F02M65/00 고압가스의 사용 F02M67/00 저압장치 F02M51/02, F02M69/00; 71/00 비액체연료의 공급 F02M21/00 공기, 연료 또는 연료-공기 홍ㄴ합물의 공급 또는 전처리 연료, 공기 또는 혼합물의 전처리 보조의 공기를 가하는 것; 비연료물질 또는 보조의 연료를 가하는 것 F02M23/00; 25/00 촉매, 전기 또는 자기수단에 의한 것 혹은 음 또는 폭사에 의한 것; 열적으로 행하는 것 F02M27/00, F02M31/00 미세화(RE-ATOMISING) 또는 균질화(HOMOGENISING)하는 것에 따르는 것; 공기청정; 기타 처리 F02M29/00; 35/00; 33/00 공기취입구 또는 소음기, 흡입계통 F02M35/00 기화기 또는 분사장치로의 연료의 공급 F02M37/00 이 서브 클래스의 다른 그룹으로 분류되지 않는 주제 사항 F02M99/00

title.ko: 기관의 시동 또는 운전온도 이하에서 아이들링을 용이하게 하는 수단을 가진 기화기
title.en: Carburettors for liquid fuels

title.ko: 기관의 시동 또는 운전온도 이하에서 아이들링을 용이하게 하는 수단을 가진 기화기
title.en: Carburettors with means for facilitating engine's starting or its idling below operational temperatures

title.ko: 시동과 공회전을 용이하게 하는 수단이 연료-공기 혼합기를 농후하게 하기 위해 공기공급을 줄이기 위한 초크(자동초우크 F02M 1/08)
title.en: the means to facilitate starting or idling being chokes for enriching fuel-air mixture (automatic chokes F02M0001080000)
the means to facilitate starting or idling being auxiliary carburetting apparatus able to be put into, and out of, operation, e.g. having automatically-operated disc valves
having axially-movable valves, e.g. piston-shaped

title.ko: 시동 또는 아이들링을 용이하게 하는 수단이 자동적으로 작동하는 것 또는 하지 않는 것 (보조기화장치와 관련하는 것 F02M 1/04)
title.en: the means to facilitate starting or idling becoming operative or inoperative automatically (in connection with auxiliary carburetting apparatus F02M0001040000)
dependent on engine temperature, e.g. having thermostat
with means for electrically heating thermostat

title.ko: 연료공기 또는 연료-공기혼합기의 흡입압력에 의한 것 (연소 공기 또는 연료-공기 혼합물의 흡기 압력 및 엔진 온도 모두에 의한 것 F02M 1/10)
title.en: dependent on pressure in combustion-air- or fuel-air-mixture intake  (dependent on both pressure in combustion-air or fuel-air-mixture intake and engine temperature F02M0001100000)
Other means for enriching fuel-air mixture during starting; Priming cups; using different fuels for starting and normal operation
Enriching fuel-air mixture by depressing float to flood carburettor

title.ko: 기화기용 아이들링장치(운전온도이하에서 아이들링을 용이하게 하는 수단을 가진 것 F02M 1/00)
title.en: Idling devices for carburettors (with means for facilitating idling below operational temperatures F02M0001000000)
Preventing flow of idling fuel
under conditions where engine is driven instead of driving, e.g. driven by vehicle running down hill
Control of valves situated in the idling nozzle system, or the passage system, by electrical means or by a combination of electrical means with fluidic or mechanical means
Pneumatic or mechanical control, e.g. with speed regulation
Fuel flow cut-off by introducing air, e.g. brake air, into the idling fuel system
Increasing idling speed
by positioning the throttle flap stop, or by changing the fuel flow cross-sectional area, by electrical, electromechanical or electropneumatical means, according to engine speed

title.ko: 아이들링장치의 타의 세부(저속포트를 가열하여 빙결을 방지하는 것 F02M 15/02)
title.en: Other details of idling devices (fighting ice-formation by heating idling ports F02M0015020000)

title.ko: 기관의 상태, 예. 매니폴드의 진공, 에 반응하는 밸브 (기관의 운전온도 이하에서 아이들링을 용이하게 하는 수단을 가진 기화기 F02M 1/00)
title.en: Valves responsive to engine conditions, e.g. manifold vacuum  (carburettors with means for facilitating engine's idling below operational temperatures F02M0001000000)
Fuel metering pins; Nozzles
Passage way systems
Location of idling system outlet relative to throttle valve
Float-controlled apparatus for maintaining a constant fuel level in carburettors
with provisions to meet variations in carburettor position, e.g. upside-down position in aircraft
with pivotally or rotatably mounted float chambers
having adjustable float mechanism, e.g. to meet dissimilarities in specific gravity of different fuels
having means for venting float chambers
having means for preventing vapour lock, e.g. insulated float chambers or forced fuel circulation through float chamber with engine stopped
Other details, e.g. floats, valves, setting devices or tools
Floats

title.ko: 변동하는 상태에서 급기의 연료/공기의 비율에 영향을 미치는 수단을 가진 기화기, 예. 농후하게 하거나 또는 일정하게 유지하는 것(시동용 초크밸브 F02M 1/00)
title.en: Carburettors with means for influencing, e.g. enriching or keeping constant, fuel/air ratio of charge under varying conditions (choke valves for starting F02M0001000000)
Carburettors having aerated fuel spray nozzles
Means for enriching charge at high combustion-air flow
Means for enriching charge on sudden throttle opening, i.e. at acceleration, e.g. storage means in passage way system
using pumps
changing output according to temperature in engine
changing output according to intake vacuum

title.ko: 운동부분 없이 연료-공기의 비에 영향을 미치는 기타 장치, 예. 전기적 수단(연료/공기 비율에 영향을 미치는, 연료에 공기를 공급하는 장치 F02M7/23)
title.en: Other installations, without moving parts, for influencing fuel/air ratio, e.g. electrical means  (fuel aerating devices for influencing fuel/air ratio F02M0007230000)

title.ko: 플로트실 압을 변경하는 것(시동중에 기화기가 넘치는 것을 억제하기 위해 연-공비를 농후하게 하는 것 F02M 1/18)
title.en: Altering float-chamber pressure (enriching the fuel-air mixture during starting by depressing float to flood carburettor F02M0001180000)

title.ko: 운동부분을 갖는 연-공비에 영향을 미치는 타의 장치, 예. 밸브를 가지는 것(F02M 7/24가 우선)
title.en: Other installations, with moving parts, for influencing fuel/air ratio, e.g. having valves (F02M0007240000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 플로트실 압을 변경하는 것(시동중에 기화기를 넘치는 것을 억제하는 것에 의해 압하하여 연-공비를 농후하게 하는 것 F02M 1/18)
title.en: Altering the float-chamber pressure (enriching the fuel-air mixture during starting by depressing float to flood carburettor F02M0001180000)

title.ko: 보조제트, 즉. 어떤 특정상태, 예. 최대 출력, 에서만 작동하는 것 (연소공기가 고속으로 흐를 때에 급기를 농후하게 하는 수단 F02M7/04; 급격한 교축 개방시에 급기를 농후하게 하는 수단 F02M7/06)
title.en: Auxiliary jets, i.e. operating only under certain conditions, e.g. full power   (means for enriching charge at high combustion-air flow F02M0007040000; means for enriching charge on sudden throttle opening, i.e. at acceleration F02M0007060000)

title.ko: 연료분사노즐의 횡단면적을 제어하는 수단을 가지는 것(공기의 교축밸브 위치에 의하는 것 F02M 7/22)
title.en: with means for controlling cross-sectional area of fuel spray nozzle (dependent on air-throttle valve position F02M0007220000)
operated automatically, e.g. dependent on exhaust-gas analysis
by a pneumatically adjustable piston-like element, e.g. constant depression carburettors

title.ko: 연료계량 오리피스의 횡단면적을 제어하는 수단을 가지는 것(공기의 교축위치에 의한 것 F02M 7/22)
title.en: with means for controlling cross-sectional area of fuel-metering orifice (dependent on air-throttle position F02M0007220000)
operated automatically, e.g. dependent on altitude

title.ko: 연료류의 횡단면적이 공기교축 밸브의 위치에 의하여 제어되는 것(그 교축밸브가 공기통로를 횡단하여 미끄럼 운동되는 것 F02M 9/06)
title.en: fuel flow cross-sectional area being controlled dependent on air-throttle-valve position (the throttle valve being slidably arranged transversely to air passage F02M0009060000)
Fuel aerating devices
Controlling flow of aerating air
dependent on position of optionally operable throttle means
dependent on temperature or pressure

title.ko: 나비모양 이외의 공기 또는 연료-공기혼합기용 통로와 교축밸브를 가진 기화기(래지스터); 기화기 11/00(형상 또는 위치를 변경될 수 있는 연료-공기혼합실에 가진 기화기)
title.en: Carburettors having air or fuel-air mixture passage throttling valves other than of butterfly type (register-type carburettors F02M0011000000); Carburettors having fuel-air mixing chambers of variable shape or position

title.ko: 통로를 횡단하여 미끄럼 운동을 할 수 있는 교축밸브, 예. 피스톤상의 밸브를 가진 것
title.en: having throttling valves, e.g. of piston shape, slidably arranged transversely to the passage
with throttling valves sliding in a plane inclined to the passage

title.ko: 교축위치에 의하여 연료분무노즐의 횡단면적을 변화시키는 수단을 가진 것 (연료/공기 비율에 영향을주기 위해서 공압식으로 조절 가능한 피스톤형 요소에 의해서 자동으로 작동되는 장치 F02M7/17)
title.en: with means for varying cross-sectional area of fuel spray nozzle dependent on throttle position  (installations, operated automatically by a pneumatically adjustable piston-like element, for influencing fuel/air ratio F02M0007170000)
having throttling valves rotatably mounted in the passage
having valves, or like controls, of elastic-wall type for controlling the passage, or for varying cross-sectional area, of fuel-air mixing chambers
having other specific means for controlling the passage, or for varying cross-sectional area, of fuel-air mixing chambers
Axially movable throttle valves concentric with the axis of the mixture passage
the throttle valves having mushroom-shaped bodies
having venturi and nozzle relatively displaceable essentially along the venturi axis

Multi-stage carburettors; Register-type carburettors, i.e. with slidable or rotatable throttling valves in which a plurality of fuel nozzles, other than only an idling nozzle and a main one, are sequentially exposed to air stream by throttling valve
with throttling valve, e.g. of flap or butterfly type, in a later stage opening automatically
the later-stage valves having damping means
Other carburettors with throttling valve of flap or butterfly type
Register carburettors with throttling valve movable transversally to air passage
Register carburettors with rotatable throttling valves

title.ko: 2개이상의 별개의 기화기의 배열(응축연료의 재무화 또는 연료-공기혼합기의 균질화 F02M 29/00); 2종이상을 사용하는 기화기(소량의 2차연료를 가하는 장치 F02M 25/00)
title.en: Arrangements of two or more separate carburettors (re-atomising condensed fuel or homogenising fuel-air mixture F02M0029000000); Carburettors using more than one fuel (apparatus for adding small quantities of secondary fuel F02M0025000000)
Separate carburettors
structurally united
the carburettors using different fuels
Carburettors adapted to use liquid and gaseous fuels, e.g. alternatively
Carburettors with heating, cooling or thermal insulating means for combustion-air, fuel or fuel-air mixture
with heating means, e.g. to combat ice-formation
the means being electrical
Heat shieldings, e.g. from engine radiations

title.ko: 메인 그룹 1/00에서 15/00의 장치로 분류되지 않는 적절한 특성을 가지는 기화기(촉매, 전기적 수단, 자기, 광선, 음파등에 의한 연소 공기, 연료 또는 연료-공기 혼합기체의 처리 장치 F02M 27/00; 기화기와 저압 연료 분사 장치의 조합 F02M 71/00)
title.en: Carburettors having pertinent characteristics not provided for in, or of interest apart from, the apparatus of main groups F02M0001000000-F02M0015000000 (apparatus for treating combustion-air, fuel, or fuel-air mixture by catalysts, electric means, magnetism, rays, sonic waves, or the like F02M0027000000;combinations of carburettors and low-pressure fuel-injection apparatus F02M0071000000)
Floatless carburettors
having fuel inlet valve controlled by diaphragm
having overflow chamber determining constant fuel level
Carburettors having one or more fuel passages opening in a valve-seat surrounding combustion-air passage, the valve being opened by passing air
the valve being of an eccentrically mounted butterfly type
Carburettors having one or more fuel passages opening in valve-member of air throttle
the valve-member being of butterfly type
Carburettors with fuel-supply parts opened and closed in synchronism with engine stroke
Carburettors having continuously-rotating bodies, e.g. surface carburettors
Other surface carburettors
with fuel bath
with air bubbling through bath
with wicks
with other wetted bodies
fuel being drawn through a porous body
Carburettors with fire-protecting devices, e.g. combined with fire-extinguishing apparatus
automatically closing fuel conduits on outbreak of fire
Other carburettors combined or associated with other apparatus, e.g. air filters
Carburettors having fitments facilitating their cleaning

title.ko: 달리 분류되어 있지 않은 기화기의 제어(외부제어장치 F02M 19/12)
title.en: Controlling of carburettors, not otherwise provided for (external control gear F02M0019120000)
Selection of particular materials for carburettors, e.g. sheet metal, plastic, or translucent materials
Float-controlled carburettors not otherwise provided for
Carburettors characterised by draught direction and not otherwise provided for
with down-draught
with up-draught

title.ko: 빙결방지용 수단이 있는 기화기(열식 F02M 15/02)
title.en: Carburettors having means for combating ice-formation (thermally F02M0015020000)
Use of cold, produced by carburettors, for other purposes

title.ko: 그룹 1/00에서 17/00의 장치로 분류되지 않는 또는 그것들에게는 없는 주목할만한 기화기의 세부, 구성요소로서의 부품 또는 부속품
title.en: Details, component parts, or accessories of carburettors, not provided for in, or of interest apart from, the apparatus of groups F02M0001000000-F02M0017000000
Apparatus for testing, tuning, or synchronising carburettors, e.g. carburettor flow stands

title.ko: 계량오리피스, 예. 직경 가변식(운전중 가변인 것 7/18)
title.en: Metering-orifices, e.g. variable in diameter (variable during operation F02M0007180000)
Metering orifices not variable in diameter
Fuel atomising nozzles; Arrangement of emulsifying air conduits
Mushroom-shaped atomising nozzles
Fuel-metering pins or needles
Other details of fuel conduits
Venturis
in multiple arrangement

title.ko: 외부 제어장치, 예. 데시포트(dash-pots)를 가지는 것 (다단기화기의 후단에 있는 감이수단 F02M 11/04)
title.en: External control gear, e.g. having dash-pots  (dampening means in later stages of multi-stage carburettors F02M0011040000)
Apparatus for supplying engines with non-liquid fuels, e.g. gaseous fuels stored in liquid form
for gaseous fuels
Gas-air mixing apparatus
Apparatus for de-liquefying, e.g. by heating
for non-gaseous fuels
for fuels with low melting point, e.g. apparatus having heating means
for fuels in pulverised state
Engine-pertinent apparatus for feeding, or treating before their admission to engine, combustion-air, fuel, or fuel-air mixture
Apparatus for adding secondary air to fuel-air mixture
with personal control
the secondary air-valve controlled by main combustion-air throttle
with automatic control
dependent on engine speed
dependent on pressure in main combustion-air induction system
using valves directly opened by low pressure
dependent on temperature, e.g. engine temperature
characterised by being combined with device for, or by secondary air effecting, re-atomising of condensed fuel
characterised by adding hot air

title.ko: 연소-공기, 주연료 또는 연료-공기 혼합물에 비연료 물질 또는 소량의 2차 연료를 첨가하기 위한 엔진 관련 장치 (연료-공기 혼합물에 이차 공기를 가하는 것 F02M23/00; 배기가스를 가하는 것 F02M 26/00; 2종 이상의 연료 또는 액체연료와 다른 액체에 동시에 작용하는 연료분사장치 F02M43/00)
title.en: Engine-pertinent apparatus for adding non-fuel substances or small quantities of secondary fuel to combustion-air, main fuel or fuel-air mixture (adding secondary air to fuel-air mixture F02M0023000000; adding exhaust gases F02M0026000000; fuel-injection apparatus operating simultaneously on two or more fuels or on a liquid fuel and another liquid F02M0043000000)
Adding fuel and water emulsion, water or steam
Adding water
into the charge intakes
into the cylinders
Producing and adding steam
into the charge intakes
into the cylinders
adding lubricant vapours
adding fuel vapours drawn from engine fuel reservoir

title.ko: 아세틸렌, 수중의 수소 이외의 수소, 대기중의 산소 이외의 산소 또는 오존을 가하는 것
title.en: adding acetylene, non-waterborne hydrogen, non-airborne oxygen, or ozone

title.ko: 전기가스를 발생시키는 수단을 가진 장치(광선과 동시에 발생하는 오존을 사용하는 것 F02M 27/06)
title.en: the apparatus having means for generating such gases (using rays and simultaneously generating ozone F02M0027060000)

title.ko: 서브그룹의 25/022에서 25/10으로 분류되어 있지 않는 안티노크제를 가하는 것
title.en: adding anti-knock agents, not provided for in groups F02M0025022000-F02M0025100000

title.ko: 배기 가스를 연소 공기, 주 연료 또는 연료 공기 혼합물에 가하는 기관에 적절한 장치, 예. 배기가스 재순환 [EGR] 시스템
title.en: Engine-pertinent apparatus for adding exhaust gases to combustion-air, main fuel or fuel-air mixture, e.g. by exhaust gas recirculation [EGR] systems

Internal exhaust gas recirculation, i.e. wherein the residual exhaust gases are trapped in the cylinder or pushed back from the intake or the exhaust manifold into the combustion chamber without the use of additional passages
EGR systems specially adapted for supercharged engines
with a single mechanically or electrically driven intake charge compressor
with a single turbocharger
High pressure loops, i.e. wherein recirculated exhaust gas is taken out from the exhaust system upstream of the turbine and reintroduced into the intake system downstream of the compressor
Low pressure loops, i.e. wherein recirculated exhaust gas is taken out from the exhaust downstream of the turbocharger turbine and reintroduced into the intake system upstream of the compressor

Mixed pressure loops, i.e. wherein recirculated exhaust gas is either taken out upstream of the turbine and reintroduced upstream of the compressor, or is taken out downstream of the turbine and reintroduced downstream of the compressor
for engines having two or more intake charge compressors or exhaust gas turbines, e.g. a turbocharger combined with an additional compressor
Constructional details, e.g. structural combinations of EGR systems and supercharger systems; Arrangement of the EGR and supercharger systems with respect to the engine

comprising a fuel-displaced free piston for intermittently metering and supplying fuel to injection nozzles
having cyclically-operated valves connecting injection nozzles to a source of fuel under pressure during the injection period

title.ko: 인젝터에 연속적인 연료류를 계량하기 위한 수단, 혹은 인젝터의 상류의 연료압력을 바꾸기 위한 수단에 의하여 특징지워진것
title.en: characterised by means for metering continuous fuel flow to injectors or means for varying fuel pressure upstream of injectors

title.ko: 그 수단이 인젝터에의 연료통로를 교축하는 계량밸브(meterig valves) 혹은 도관에 오버플로우하여 교축하는 바이패스밸브인 것으로서 계량밸브는 엔진 작동 파라미터, 예. 엔진부하, 스피드, 온도, 공기량, 에 응동하는 장치에 의하여 동작되는 것 (연료 바이패스 통로에서의 압력, 또는 분사 노즐로의 연료흐름을 가변적으로 조절하기 위해서 계량 또는 교축된 연료 압력에 대응해서 스로틀 밸브에 작용하는 압력을 변경하는 수단 F02M69/26)
title.en: the means being metering valves throttling fuel passages to injectors or by-pass valves throttling overflow passages, the metering valves being actuated by a device responsive to the engine working parameters, e.g. engine load, speed, temperature or quantity of air  (the means varying fuel pressure in a fuel by-pass passage, the pressure acting on a throttle valve against the action of metered or throttled fuel pressure for variably throttling fuel flow to injection nozzles F02M0069260000)

title.ko: 그 장치가 서보모터인 것, 예. 엔진의 흡기공기의 압력 혹은 진공을 사용하는 것 (공기 흡입 도관에 이동 가능하게 장착되어, 엔진에 유입되는 공기양에 따라서 이동되는 부재를 포함하는 작동 장치 F02M69/22)
title.en: the device being a servo-motor, e.g. using engine intake air pressure or vacuum  (the actuating device comprising a member movably mounted in the air intake conduit and displaced according to the quantity of air admitted to the engine F02M0069220000)
the device comprising a member movably mounted in the air intake conduit and displaced according to the quantity of air admitted to the engine
the device comprising a member for transmitting the movement of the air throttle valve actuated by the operator to the valves controlling fuel passages

the means varying fuel pressure in a fuel by-pass passage, the pressure acting on a throttle valve against the action of metered or throttled fuel pressure for variably throttling fuel flow to injection nozzles, e.g. to keep constant the pressure differential at the metering valve
characterised by means for cutting-out the fuel supply to the engine or to main injectors during certain operating periods, e.g. deceleration

title.ko: 기관의 시동 또는 아이들링을 촉진하기 위한 수단 혹은 급기를 농후하게 하기 위한 수단에 특징이 있는 것, 예. 작동 온도 이하 또는 엔진의 고출력 요구시
title.en: characterised by means for facilitating the starting-up or idling of engines or by means for enriching fuel charge, e.g. below operational temperatures or upon high power demand of engines
with an air by-pass around the air throttle valve or with an auxiliary air passage, e.g. with a variably controlled valve therein
with an auxiliary fuel circuit supplying fuel to the engine, e.g. with the fuel pump outlet being directly connected to the injection nozzles

title.ko: 인젝터에 연료흐름을 변경하여 농축화 하는 구조를 갖는 것, 예. 연료계량장치에 있어서, 또는 분사노즐의 연료통로가 넘침통로를 교축하고 있는 밸브에서 작동하는 것에 의한 것
title.en: having an enrichment mechanism modifying fuel flow to injectors, e.g. by acting on the fuel metering device or on the valves throttling fuel passages to injection nozzles or overflow passages

title.ko: 연료압력을 사용하는 것, 예. 연료계량장치의 제어실내의 연료압력을 바꾸는 것
title.en: using fuel pressure, e.g. by varying fuel pressure in the control chambers of the fuel metering device  (the means varying fuel pressure in a fuel by-pass passage, the pressure acting on a throttle valve against the action of metered or throttled fuel pressure for variably throttling fuel flow to injection nozzles F02M0069260000)
using variably controlled air pressure, e.g. by modifying the intake air vacuum signal acting on the fuel metering device
using other means than variable fluid pressure, e.g. acting on the fuel metering device mechanically or electrically
characterised by means for supplying extra fuel to the engine on sudden air throttle opening, e.g at acceleration

title.ko: 분류되지 않은 또는 관계없는 세부 또는 부속품, 69/02부터 69/44 의 클래스 속하는 장치,
title.en: Details, component parts or accessories not provided for in, or of interest apart from, the apparatus covered by groups F02M0069020000-F02M0069440000
Arrangement of air sensors
Arrangement of fuel distributors
Arrangement of fuel metering devices
Arrangement of fuel pressure regulators
Combinations of carburettors and low-pressure fuel-injection apparatus
with fuel-air mixture being produced by the carburettor and being compressed by a pump for subsequent injection into main combustion-air
with carburettor being used at starting or idling only and injection apparatus being used during normal operation of engine
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
